title: Typesense Search Result
description: Schema for a Typesense search response including hits, facets, grouped results, and conversational search answers.

facet_counts.description: Facet value counts for each faceted field in the search request.

found.description: Total number of documents matching the search query.

found_docs.description: Total number of matching documents before grouping is applied.

search_time_ms.description: Time taken to execute the search in milliseconds.

out_of.description: Total number of documents in the collection.

search_cutoff.description: Whether the search was terminated early due to time limits.

page.description: Current page number in the result set.

hits.description: Array of search result hits, each containing a matched document with highlights and scoring information.

grouped_hits.description: Array of grouped search results when group_by is used in the search request.

request_params.description: Echo of the parameters used for the search request.

SearchHit.description: A single search result hit containing the matched document and scoring metadata.

document.description: The matched document with all requested fields.

highlights.description: Array of field-level highlights showing matched tokens in context.

highlight.description: Structured highlight object with support for nested fields.

text_match.description: Composite text match score for ranking. Higher values indicate better keyword matches.

text_match_info.description: Breakdown of the text match scoring components.

best_field_score.description: Score from the best matching field.

best_field_weight.description: Weight of the best matching field.

fields_matched.description: Number of fields that matched the query.

tokens_matched.description: Number of query tokens that matched.

geo_distance_meters.description: Distance in meters from the search geo point for each geopoint field.

vector_distance.description: Distance between the query vector and document vector. Lower values indicate greater similarity.

hybrid_search_info.description: Scoring breakdown when hybrid keyword and vector search is used.

GroupedHit.description: A group of search hits sharing the same group_by field value.

found.description: Number of documents in this group.

group_key.description: Values of the group_by field for this group.

Highlight.description: Highlight information for a matched field.

snippet.description: Highlighted snippet of the field value with matched tokens wrapped in mark tags.

snippets.description: Array of highlighted snippets for array-type fields.

values.description: Full highlighted values for array-type fields.

matched_tokens.description: Tokens in the field that matched the query.

indices.description: Indices of matched values in array-type fields.

FacetCounts.description: Facet value counts for a specific field.

count.description: Number of documents with this facet value.

highlighted.description: Highlighted facet value with matched tokens.

stats.description: Statistical summary for numeric faceted fields.

sum.description: Sum of values across matching documents.

total_values.description: Total number of values across matching documents.

ConversationResponse.description: Response from the conversational search (RAG) feature including the generated answer.

answer.description: Natural language answer generated by the LLM from the search results context.

conversation_history.description: History of messages in the conversation for multi-turn context.

conversation_id.description: Unique identifier for the conversation, used for follow-up queries.
